popularStory.headline: Biography
popularStory.description:
Marjory Sutherland was the wife of William Sinclair, 1st Earl of Caithness. They were the parents of:[1]

Sir Oliver Sinclair
William Sinclair, 2nd Earl of Caithness.
Alexander Sinclair
George Sinclai …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marjory Sutherland於1424年出生在蘇格蘭凱特內斯登亞斯時，她的父親Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath29歲，母親Catherine Chalmer27歲。她於1432年8月12日與William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1476年在她的家鄉享年52歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾 格拉維也亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marjory Sutherland于1424年出生在苏格兰凱特內斯登亞斯时，她的父亲Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath29岁，母亲Catherine Chalmer27岁。她于1432年8月12日与William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1476年在她的家乡享年52岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯登可爾德登可爾德 凱德拉爾 格拉維也亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Sutherland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness): habitational name from the Scottish county of Sutherland, named with Old Norse súthr ‘south, southern’ + land ‘land’ because the territory lay south of Scandinavia and the Norse colonies in the Orkney and Shetland Islands.
History: This is the name of a Highland Scottish clan associated with the county of Sutherland.

nameMeanings.name: Marjory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marjory Sutherland was born in 1424, in Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland, her father, Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath, was 29 and her mother, Catherine Chalmer, was 27. She married William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness on 12 August 1432. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1476, in her hometown, at the age of 52, and was buried in Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marjory Sutherland est née en 1424, à Dunbeath, Caithness, Écosse, son père, Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Catherine Chalmer, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness le 12 août 1432. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1476, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marjory Sutherland 1424 in Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath 29 und ihre Mutter Catherine Chalmer 27. Sie hat am 12. August 1432 William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1476 im Alter von 52 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjory Sutherland è nata il nel 1424 nel Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Catherine Chalmer, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness il 12 agosto 1432. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1476, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolta a Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marjory Sutherlandが1424年にスコットランドケイスネスダンベアスで生まれた時，父Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeathは29歳，母Catherine Chalmerは27歳であった。1432年8月12日にWilliam Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithnessと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1476年に故郷で52歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスダンケルドダンケルド カスエドラル グラビーアルドにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Pe: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴 그레이비아어드
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marjory Sutherland(이)가 1424년 스컷랜드 케이스네스 던브이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Chalmer(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1432년 8월 12일 William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1476년 그녀의 고향에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 던켈드 던켈드 캐테드럴 그레이비아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjory Sutherland nasceu em 1424, em Dunbeath, Caithness, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Chalmer, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness em 12 de agosto de 1432. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1476, em sua cidade natal, com 52 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Pe: дункелд кэтедраль гравиард, дункелд, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marjory Sutherland родилась в 1424 г. в местности дунбит, цеитнесс, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Sutherland , Baron Dunbeath было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Chalmer, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness 12 августа 1432 г. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1476 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 52 лет и была похоронена в местности дункелд кэтедраль гравиард, дункелд, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания.

Se casó con William Sinclair 1st Earl of Caithness el 12 de agosto de 1432. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1476, en su pueblo, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultada en Dunkeld Cathedral Graveyard, Dunkeld, Perth and Kinross, Escocia, Reino Unido.
